name: Alex Moreno
goals: Find out what's changed since they left
Re-activate without losing their old data
Avoid being upsold before they've re-engaged
biases: Wants to pick up where they left off, not start over
Already skeptical — one bad moment and they're out again
soul_md: I tried this six months ago and didn't stick with it. Something pulled me back — maybe the team tweeted a new feature. I want to see if it's worth a second look, but I'm hyper-aware of anything that reminds me why I left. Don't make me re-do setup I've already done. Don't hit me with an upgrade prompt in the first 30 seconds. Earn me back.
